author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase 2.11 (flex_attention) conformance test. Build a fixture generator (regenerate_flex_attention_fixtures.py) using torch.nn.attention.flex_attention.flex_attention to produce reference outputs covering: (a) baseline no-mask/no-score-mod, (b) causal mask, (c) block-diagonal mask, (d) ALiBi-style additive position bias score_mod, (e) empty/all-masked output (PyTorch contract: NaN). Both float32 and float64, CPU + GPU lanes, autograd Q/K/V grads. Tolerance F32_MATMUL_CPU=1e-4, F32_MATMUL_GPU=1e-3, F64=1e-9. Surface gate: 2 items (#773 entries) — re-export ferrotorch_core::flex_attention and canonical ferrotorch_core::flex_attention::flex_attention. DO NOT edit _surface_exclusions.toml (orchestrator removes the entries). Reference: conformance_linalg.rs scaffolding shape.
